courses.title: Web Development Fundamentals
courses.summary: Learn the core building blocks of the web — HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Perfect for anyone starting their journey into web development.

courses.title: Graphic Design Basics
courses.summary: Get hands-on with design principles, typography, and color theory. Build a strong visual foundation for any creative career.

courses.title: Project Management
courses.summary: Master the essentials of planning, executing, and delivering projects on time. Ideal for team leads and aspiring project managers.

courses.title: UX & UI Design
courses.summary: Dive into user experience and interface design. Learn to create intuitive, beautiful products that users love.

courses.title: JavaScript Advanced
courses.summary: Take your JavaScript skills to the next level with async programming, design patterns, and modern ES6+ features.

courses.title: Data Analysis with Excel
courses.summary: Learn to analyze, visualize, and interpret data using Excel. A practical course for business professionals and analysts.

courses.title: Digital Marketing
courses.summary: Explore SEO, social media, email campaigns, and paid ads. Build a complete digital marketing strategy from scratch.

courses.title: Cybersecurity Essentials
courses.summary: Understand threats, vulnerabilities, and how to defend against them. A must-have course for anyone working in tech.

courses.title: Python for Beginners
courses.summary: Start programming with one of the world's most popular languages. From basics to building real projects — no prior experience needed.

courses.title: Leadership & Communication
courses.summary: Develop the soft skills that make great leaders. Learn how to communicate clearly, motivate teams, and resolve conflict.

courses.title: Cloud Computing with AWS
courses.summary: Get started with Amazon Web Services and learn to deploy, manage, and scale applications in the cloud.

courses.title: React for Developers
courses.summary: Build modern, component-based web applications with React. Covers hooks, state management, and real-world project structure.

courses.title: SEO & Content Strategy
courses.summary: Learn how to rank on search engines and create content that drives traffic. Great for marketers, bloggers, and business owners.

courses.title: Agile & Scrum
courses.summary: Learn the Agile mindset and Scrum framework used by top tech teams. Practical tools for delivering better software faster.

courses.title: Photoshop & Illustrator
courses.summary: Master Adobe's industry-standard tools for photo editing and vector graphics. From basic retouching to professional illustrations.
